Format: verilog
Found 8 module/subcircuit definitions

Start: picorv32
  -> cell type picorv32
Target: (all endpoints)

Tracing: picorv32.clk -> all endpoints
--------------------------------------------------

Found 5 path(s):
Format: <CELL>|<HierarchicalInstanceName>|<PIN>   where HierarchicalInstanceName = <inst1>/<inst2>/.../<CELL_INST>
        <CELL>|<internal>|<NET>   for the topmost CELL's pin (same as NET) connecting to a subblock pin, OR a local maxima in the path where 2 subblock pins are connected by a NET inside the CELL
